title: 1 ETF to Buy Hand Over Fist If You Believe in Elon Musk's Vision for America
full_text: The article suggests investing in the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) as a way to capitalize on Elon Musk's vision for a tech-powered American economy, especially given his new role in the Department of Government Efficiency. VOO offers diversified exposure to leading tech companies, aligning with pro-tech policies and significant investments in AI infrastructure by the current administration. The ETF is highlighted for its strong performance, low fees, and holdings in major tech giants.
summary: The article suggests investing in the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (VOO) as a way to capitalize on Elon Musk's vision for a tech-powered American economy, especially given his new role in the Department of Government Efficiency.
